title: Applicability
doc_html:
§5225. Applicability

            The provisions of this Part, except as otherwise specifically provided by Book VIII of the Code of Civil Procedure, shall govern and regulate the procedure in proceedings in the program.

            Acts 2021, No. 281, §1.

            NOTE: See R.S. 13:5226 regarding termination of this Part on Aug. 1, 2025.
doc_text:
§5225.  Applicability
The provisions of this Part, except as otherwise specifically provided by Book VIII
of the Code of Civil Procedure, shall govern and regulate the procedure in proceedings in the
program.
Acts 2021, No. 281, §1.
NOTE: See R.S. 13:5226 regarding termination of this Part on Aug. 1, 2025.
